svg.title: MedBuddy full vision — primary MedCam lane, WhatsApp bridge, AI brain, HIS↔NHCX, CFO and flywheel
svg.desc: End-to-end product vision with MedCam direct upload as the primary clinical lane, WhatsApp as a transitional bridge, the full AI brain, HIS and NHCX bridges, four role dashboards including CFO, the data flywheel, and outcome metrics.
svg.text: Primary lane: MedCam direct capture → server. Bridge lane: WhatsApp absorb-and-nudge. AI brain prevents queries before they're raised. HIS ↔ NHCX bridged. CFO sees the money no one shows them today.
1 · Capture lanes — primary vs bridge vs system pull

g.text: The standard for all clinical capture going forward.
Absorbs the chaos surgeons already have. Nudges them to MedCam over time.
Pulls structured records and documents already inside the hospital.

svg.text: ↑ Adoption migrates from WhatsApp to MedCam over ~6 months ↑
2 · AI brain — turn raw inputs into a NHCX-ready claim

g.text: Every artefact flows through this brain. Every output becomes training data.

svg.text: 3 · Bridges (HIS ↔ NHCX) and four role dashboards

g.text: 🔌 Bridges — the only middleware that sits between hospital & insurer
Practo HMS · Insta HMS · eHospital NIC

svg.text: 4 · Before → After — what changes for the people in the loop

g.text: 📲 Surgeon WhatsApps OT photo → clerk saves, crops, renames, converts JPG→PDF
📝 Doctor's handwritten note → clerk re-types into 6 different portal UIs
↩️ "PROVIDE POST OP HPE REPORT" → 25–40 min hunting · 23 days lost · 3–8 rounds
❓ CFO has no view of ₹ locked, aging buckets, underpayments, TAT vs peers
🌐 6 government portals, zero APIs, every scheme has its own quirks
📦 15–40% of hospital revenue locked at any moment
📸 Capture once on MedCam (or WhatsApp bridge) → auto in PatientName_MRN folder
✍️ Handwriting → AI case sheet with Dx, ICD, Rx, meds and reasoning
🛡️ Risk scorer blocks high-query claims before submit → fewer queries arrive
📨 When queries do arrive: classified, drafted, document pre-attached in 45s
⚙️ NHCX FHIR submission · UTR auto-reconciled · full AuditEvent trail
💼 CFO sees ₹ unlocked, query-rate trend, ₹ saved YTD in one dashboard

svg.text: 6 · Data flywheel — every query becomes training data

g.text: Better predictions feed back into Usage → moat compounds with every claim

svg.text: 7 · The numbers the CFO sees first
